_comment: Hand-curated events for the auto-generated Timeline that aren't derivable from press articles or meeting summaries. Each entry MUST have a citation. Add entries here for pre-crisis history (events before press coverage began), out-of-band events (statewide policy changes affecting ICCSD), and any claim that needs a direct primary-source citation rather than a press-article citation.

events.title: Undisclosed $10 million interfund transfer from health-insurance fund to general fund
events.summary: District administrators moved $10 million from the health-insurance fund into the general fund to cover a payroll cash-flow shortfall. The transfer was not reported to the board at the time and was omitted from the next quarterly financial report.

citations.label: Detailed by The Cedar Rapids Gazette

events.title: Chief Financial Officer Adam Kurth leaves ICCSD
events.summary: Adam Kurth, who had succeeded Leslie Finger as CFO in 2023, departs the district.

citations.label: Reported by The Cedar Rapids Gazette

events.title: ICCSD incurs $525,110 in federal tax penalties
events.summary: Per Cedar Rapids Gazette reporting, the district accrued $525,110 in federal tax penalties between September 30, 2023 and June 30, 2025 for filing payroll and excise taxes "significantly late."

events.title: Former CFO Leslie Finger retires after warning successor
events.summary: Cedar Rapids Gazette obtained emails showing Finger had warned his successor Adam Kurth about ~$500K in federal tax penalties, the absence of financial reports, and growth in the special-education deficit "by millions of dollars."
